name: Authentication frontend session flow
description: Build the authentication frontend flow: sign-up and sign-in pages (email/password via Firebase Auth SDK), backend token exchange call (POST /api/v1/auth/exchange), in-memory access token + secure-storage refresh token persistence, automatic silent refresh before expiry, and sign-out (POST /api/v1/auth/logout + clear local state). Includes protected-route guard that redirects unauthenticated users and an auth store (Zustand or Context). Also establishes the new-user routing hook so first-time users are directed to onboarding. Per docs/product-specs/authentication.md. Does NOT include profile editing or household flows.
